Smart Waste Management

A modern platform to manage urban waste operations efficiently.

View Dashboard
{/* PROBLEM */}

The Problem

Urban waste management often suffers from poor coordination, lack of real-time visibility, and inefficient resource allocation.

{/* SOLUTION */}

The Solution

A centralized system to manage bins, vehicles, drivers, and authorities using structured data and clear workflows.

{/* FEATURES */}
🗑️

Smart Bin Tracking

Monitor bin data and collection status.

🚛

Fleet Management

Manage waste collection vehicles efficiently.

👷

Driver Assignment

Assign drivers and manage responsibilities.

📊

Data-Driven

Powered by a structured relational database.

{/* CTA */}

Built for Smarter Cities

Explore the System
); } export default Landing;
